text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. A key part of AI is machine learning, where machines are trained on large amounts of data to improve their performance without being explicitly programmed for every task. Deep learning is a more advanced type of machine learning that uses complex neural networks, similar to the human brain, to process information. AI is already part of our daily lives: it powers virtual assistants like Siri, recommends movies on streaming services, and helps cars drive themselves.
